name: Amyris, Inc.
description: Amyris, Inc. is a leading synthetic biotechnology company that operates in the clean health and beauty, and flavors and fragrances markets. The company applies its innovative bioscience platform to convert plant-based sugars into high-value carbon molecules, providing sustainable alternatives to petroleum-derived and animal-sourced ingredients. Through its proprietary technology, Amyris designs and manufactures sustainable ingredients for global brands, enabling them to offer environmentally friendly and high-performing products to consumers worldwide.
